behavior: infra/config/values/common.yaml declares a cluster_operators list ({name,namespace,version,manifest}) with agent-sandbox v0.5.0rc1, traefik-config and coredns migrated in; it is the single source of truth for cluster-wide component versions.
verification: toolkit config validate && python3 -c "import yaml,sys; d=yaml.safe_load(open('infra/config/values/common.yaml')); ops={o['name'] for o in d['cluster_operators']}; sys.exit(0 if {'agent-sandbox','traefik-config','coredns'} <= ops else 1)"

behavior: toolkit infra k8s deploy applies every cluster_operators entry via kubectl apply --server-side (dry-run validated, per-operator logging), with no hardcoded per-component branches left in infra.py or the Makefile.
verification: grep -RqE "_get_traefik_config_path|coredns-custom.yaml | kubectl apply" toolkit/ Makefile && echo FAIL && exit 1 || (cd .. && cd kubelab && python -m pytest toolkit -k cluster_operators -q)

behavior: agent-sandbox v0.5.0rc1 is vendored at infra/k8s/cluster/agent-sandbox/manifest.yaml (CRD agents.x-k8s.io/v1beta1 + controller + RBAC + namespace), version-pinned and reproducible.
make sync-operators (or extended sync-k8s-images) refreshes a vendored operator manifest deterministically from the SSOT-pinned version.
After make deploy-k8s ENV=staging the agent-sandbox controller is Ready and the sandboxes.agents.x-k8s.io v1beta1 CRD is served on the staging cluster.
verification: KUBECONFIG=~/.kube/kubelab-staging-config kubectl get crd sandboxes.agents.x-k8s.io -o jsonpath='{.spec.versions[*].name}' | grep -qw v1beta1 && KUBECONFIG=~/.kube/kubelab-staging-config kubectl -n agent-sandbox-system rollout status deploy/agent-sandbox-controller --timeout=180s

behavior: iris SDD-034c Kubernetes adapter passes its conformance suite (Start/Stop/Status/Exec + sidecar) against the real staging cluster — the downstream validation this spec unblocks.
